# RACI Template

Use this template to define who is Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, and Informed for major activities.

| Activity | Responsible | Accountable | Consulted | Informed |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Define requirements | BA / PdM | PdM | Stakeholders, Tech Lead | PM, Team |
| Implementation | Developers | Tech Lead | QA Lead, UX | PdM, PM |
| QA sign-off | QA Lead | QA Lead | Developers | PM, PdM |
| Release deployment | Release Manager | Release Manager | DevOps, QA, Support | Stakeholders |
